acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/audit.sh rejects findings[] items that are not objects with non-blank severity, title, evidence, observed, expected, and classification.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The checker now requires object findings with required non-blank fields, and the non-object plus blank-required-content negative smokes record expected failures.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/audit.sh rejects findings[].severity and findings[].classification values outside qd vocabulary.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The checker constrains severity and classification to qd audit-report schema vocabulary, with bad-severity and bad-classification negative smokes.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/audit.sh rejects absolute or traversal findings[].path values when path is present.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The checker rejects absolute, traversal, and non-string optional path values; corresponding negative smokes are present.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/audit.sh rejects non-positive or non-integer findings[].line values when line is present.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The checker rejects non-positive and non-integer optional line values; bad-line and non-integer-line smokes are present.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Existing qd audit reports pass without weakening the contract.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The qd report-check evidence records the current report set passing under the stricter audit finding contract.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Linux validation evidence records just qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, git diff --check, and temporary-copy negative smokes for malformed audit findings.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: Required positive and negative validation logs are present under evidence/m4-qd-audit-finding-schema-contract/.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The change is limited to repository qd metadata validation and makes no macOS-specific product claim.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd metadata validation only; no macOS-specific validation is required or claimed.
